name: 00-andruia-consultant
tagline: Spanish-language project-kickoff consultant that diagnoses a workspace and drafts a roadmap plus an expert squad.
verdict: Clear branching between new and existing projects and named output files, but several load-bearing steps (registry lookup, squad selection, 'estandar de diamante') are undefined with no criteria or examples, and generated files have no re-run/overwrite protection.

highlights.summary: Frontmatter description states what the skill is but never names concrete trigger situations or phrasings.
Only generic 'use only when task matches scope' boilerplate; no specific exclusions or pointer to other skills.
'Consulto el registro raiz y propongo un Squad de 3-5 expertos' has no defined registry location or selection criteria.
